cve_description: In TagLib 1.11.1, the rebuildAggregateFrames function in id3v2framefactory.cpp has a pointer to cast vulnerability, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted audio file.
A remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability in Subconverter v0.7.2 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted config and url parameters.
